message:
Regenerate section 10.15 verification artifacts, sync beads

Ambient authority findings: updated findings with current verification
pass results. Section 10.15 bead verification evidence and summaries
(bd-2g6r, bd-721z) regenerated with latest gate outcomes.

Beads issue tracker: sync latest issue state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
